stemHtml:
An aircraft flying on the traffic circuit of a controlled aerodrome is encountering radio communications failure. Which of the following courses of action would you take?

1. Select mode 7600 if flying under radar control
2. Select mode 7700 if flying under radar control
3. Try to establish contact with the tower using all other available means and watch out for visual signals
4. Select mode 7500 and watch out for visual signals
5. Rock the aircraft wings and flash the navigation lights at irregular intervals
6. Transmit blind messages at regular intervals/times
